info.description:
HTTP API for the MoneyApp Learning Platform backend.

This spec is written for frontend integration:
- all timestamps are RFC3339 strings
- all numeric values coming from PostgreSQL are serialized as strings
- protected routes require `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`
- role- and permission-based UI should use `/api/v1/auth/me`
info.summary: Frontend-oriented contract for the LMS/L&D backend
info.title: MoneyApp Learning Platform API
